raw:
{

"judge_id": "judge_20231101",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.3": 5,
  "R1.4": 5,
  "R1.7": 3,
  "RX.1": 5,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying unsupported claims and ensuring alignment.",
  "R1.4": "The agent maps against several prior works (Lei & Candès, Alaa et al., etc.) and clearly identifies the deltas, fulfilling the s=5 criteria.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flags missing or wrong citations but does not audit every load-bearing citation comprehensively.",
  "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, particularly around the 'first' claim and coverage conditions, providing detailed reasoning.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or regressions.",
  "RX.5": "While major rewrites are traced, minor edits lack annotation, meeting s=3 criteria."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.85,
  "R1.7": 0.8,
  "RX.1": 0.9,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying unsupported claims and ensuring alignment.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against several prior works (Lei & Candès, Alaa et al., etc.) and clearly identifies the deltas, fulfilling the s=5 criteria.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing or wrong citations but does not audit every load-bearing citation comprehensively.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, particularly around the 'first' claim and coverage conditions, providing detailed reasoning.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites are traced, minor edits lack annotation, meeting s=3 criteria.
